name: helix-sdm
description: Root workspace script for documentation artifacts

scripts.docs:mockup-pdf: mkdir -p docs && md-to-pdf README.md --document-title "Helix — Mockup hub guide" --pdf-options '{"format":"Letter","printBackground":true,"margin":{"top":"18mm","bottom":"18mm","left":"16mm","right":"16mm"}}' && mv -f README.pdf docs/MOCKUP_HUB_USER_GUIDE.pdf
scripts.docs:helix-mockup-reference-pdf: mkdir -p docs && md-to-pdf docs/HELIX_MOCKUP_REFERENCE.md --document-title "Helix UI Mockup Hub — Reference & Playbook" --pdf-options '{"format":"Letter","printBackground":true,"margin":{"top":"16mm","bottom":"16mm","left":"14mm","right":"14mm"}}'
scripts.lint:mockup: htmlhint backend/public/mockup/index.html && stylelint backend/public/mockup/index.html && eslint -c backend/public/mockup/eslint.config.mjs backend/public/mockup/mockup-hub.js backend/public/mockup/theme-init.js
